basic_details.job_title: DHEW Coimbatore Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Gender Specialist & MTS Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Hub for Empowerment of Women, Coimbatore (DHEW Coimbatore)
basic_details.short_information: District Hub for Empowerment of Women, Coimbatore (DHEW Coimbatore) Recruitment 2026: District Hub for Empowerment of Women, Coimbatore has released the official notification for 2 Gender Specialist & MTS posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 31 March 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in social work or other social disciplines, 10th class pass
qualification.details: Gender Specialist: Graduate in social work or other social disciplines. Post graduates will be preferred. At least 3 years’ experience of working with the government or non-government organisations in gender focused themes. Candidate belongs to Coimbatore district only. MTS: 10th class pass under 10 + 2 system from any board. Candidate belongs to Coimbatore district only.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHEW Coimbatore Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://coimbatore.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHEW Coimbatore Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the DHEW Coimbatore Recruitment 2026 is 02 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Gender Specialist & MTS posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Gender Specialist and MTS posts under the DHEW Coimbatore Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the MTS post?
faq.answer: For the MTS post, candidates must have passed the 10th class under the 10 + 2 system from any recognized board.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Gender Specialist and MTS posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Gender Specialist and MTS posts is 35 years as of 31 March 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Gender Specialist post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Gender Specialist post will receive a salary of Rs. 21,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for DHEW Coimbatore Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q8. Which district candidates are eligible for these posts?
faq.answer: Only candidates belonging to the Coimbatore district are eligible to apply for these posts.

faq.question: Q9. What is the experience required for the Gender Specialist post?
faq.answer: For the Gender Specialist post, at least 3 years of experience working with government or non-government organizations in gender-focused themes is required.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Hub for Empowerment of Women, Coimbatore, which is https://coimbatore.nic.in.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DHEW Coimbatore Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the DHEW Coimbatore Recruitment 2026 is 02 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.
